name: Tangy Short Rib Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef short ribs into individual portions, about 2 1/2 inches wide. Remove excess fat.
2. Place the ribs on a rack in a foil-lined roasting pan and bake in a preheated 450°F oven until browned, about 20 minutes.
3. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F.
4. Remove the beef and rack from the pan; discard the fat.
5. Return the beef to the pan without the rack.
6. Heat the oil in a saucepan. Add the onions and sauté for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 2 minutes. Pour over the beef to coat.
9. Cover and bake at 350°F until the beef is fork-tender, about 2 hours, spooning sauce over the beef occasionally.
10. Skim excess fat from the sauce in the pan.
11. Arrange the beef on a platter and serve with the pan sauce.
